name: Holland Spice Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream together butter, lard, and brown sugar until light and fluffy.
2. Beat in sour cream.
3. Sift flour, cinnamon, salt, baking soda, nutmeg, and cloves into a bowl.
4. Gradually add dry ingredients to the creamed mixture, mixing well with a spoon.
5. Stir in chopped walnuts. Cover and chill for 1 hour in the refrigerator.
6. Shape dough into 4 rolls (approximately 6 inches each).
7. Chill the rolls in the refrigerator overnight.
8. Cut rolls into 1/4-inch slices.
9. Place the slices about 2-inches apart on greased baking sheets.
10. Bake at 350°F for 8 to 10 minutes, or until golden brown. Remove from baking sheets and cool on racks.
